title: Pirates of the Coast
writer: Ernesto Gastaldi, Ugo Guerra, Luciano Martino
actors: Lex Barker, Estella Blain, Livio Lorenzon
plot: (1960) Lex Barker, Estella Blain, Livion Lorenzon, Liana Orfei. A great, colorful Italian costume epic with Barker as a ship captain who is pitted against a crafty pirates. There are some interesting turnabouts, however, with plot...
